title: Lightning Payment Instrument
description: Payment instrument shared across the com.musqet.* handler family. Carries a preimage credential proving Lightning Network settlement.

handler_id.description: Business-assigned handler instance id, matching the id field of the entry in payment.handlers[] whose name is one of com.musqet.bolt12, com.musqet.lnurl-pay, or com.musqet.invoice-api.
